app.name: BandKit
app.tagline: Social and work platform for musicians
chats.policyCopy: Direct and project chats stay inside the platform: external links, suspicious requests and off-platform payment attempts are flagged for moderation.
common.layoutNotice: Layout follows the contract: desktop — left rail/content/right rail, mobile — top bar/content/bottom nav.
common.mockNotice: This is a first-pass mock screen: backend and business logic are not connected yet.
common.searchPlaceholder: Search people, bands, events and documents
dashboard.subtitle: A short dashboard for a musician or organizer: active projects, upcoming events, documents and safe actions.
dashboard.title: Band workspace
flow.wizardCopy: The real form will live here. For now the step order, footer actions and guard pattern are locked.
landing.preview.copy: This pass shows the future working social network as a stable shell: feed, bands, events, chats, documents, roles and safety are already placed correctly.
landing.preview.title: MVP launch shell
mock.message.eventUpdated: Yes, I updated the event and participants list.
mock.message.rehearsalMove: Can we move rehearsal by 30 minutes?
mock.message.suspicious: Please open https://example.com and send deposit outside the platform.
mock.post.body.drummerSearch: Need a drummer for a studio session. Contact and participation confirmation stay inside BandKit only.
mock.post.body.rehearsal: Rehearsal moved, setlist updated, documents are in the project and participants will receive notifications inside BandKit.
mock.post.body.suspicious: Suspicious mock text with an external link https://example.com to test blocked-link state.
onboarding.step.profile.copy: The user selects a profile type and receives a safe public template without extra personal data.
onboarding.step.profile.title: Profile and role
onboarding.step.verification.copy: Contact verification and future mandatory 2FA for moderators and administrators.
onboarding.step.verification.title: Email, phone and 2FA
onboarding.step.workspace.copy: The shell prepares room for a band, orchestra, studio, event and documents without rewriting layout.
onboarding.step.workspace.title: Band or project
onboarding.subtitle: Minimum flow before real modules: profile, verification and workspace.
onboarding.title: Initial setup
qa.controlsCopy: Local QA controls for roles, states, theme and translations without backend.
quick.band.copy: Start a project, add members and roles.
quick.band.title: New band
quick.document.copy: Prepare a rider, contract or setlist.
quick.document.title: Document
quick.event.copy: Create a rehearsal, concert or studio session.
quick.event.title: New event
quick.post.copy: Create a safe workspace update without external links.
quick.post.title: Feed post
rightRail.safetyCopy: External links blocked, report actions visible, restricted states safe.
rightRail.title: Section context
security.authPromise: Login, registration, email/phone verification and future 2FA are prepared as a single safe flow.
security.linkBlocked: Link blocked by MVP link policy.
security.linkNotice: External links are not allowed in messages and comments in the first pass.
security.reportAvailable: Report is available in card actions or overflow.
security.verificationRequired: This action requires verified email and phone.
settings.privacyCopy: Who can see profile, contacts, documents and activity history.
state.emptyCopy: Empty states use language-neutral illustration and localized copy.
state.errorCopy: The error is shown through a shared ErrorState with retry action.
state.loadingCopy: Skeletons match final cards so the interface does not jump.
state.notFoundCopy: The route is missing or the resource is unavailable. For private entities we do not reveal whether the object exists.
state.restrictedCopy: This screen does not leak private data and shows a safe placeholder.
trust.check.links.copy: Messages, comments and offers are checked by link policy in advance.
trust.check.links.title: External links blocked
trust.check.reports.copy: Users can report a post, message, profile or offer.
trust.check.reports.title: Reports available
trust.check.verification.copy: Key actions require verified email and phone, with future 2FA for elevated roles.
trust.check.verification.title: Verification enabled
dashboard.workspaceCopy: The shell previews the future working social network as a dashboard: invites, events, feed, documents, safety and quick actions.
state.inDevCopy: This section is not wired to the real backend yet. Everything you see elsewhere is live data.
